narration: Ever wondered how new species are born? Let’s dive into allopatric speciation.
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wondered how new species are born? Let’s dive into allopatric speciation.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered how new species are born? Let’s dive into allopatric speciation.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wondered how new species are born? Let’s dive into allopatric speciation.

narration: Allopatric speciation happens when populations are separated by physical barriers, like mountains or rivers.
visual_description: Context visual: Allopatric speciation happens when populations are separated by physical barriers, like mountains or rivers.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Allopatric speciation happens when populations are separated by physical barriers, like mountains or rivers.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Allopatric speciation happens when populations are separated by physical barriers, like mountains or rivers.

narration: But here's the twist... over time, those isolated groups adapt to their unique environments.
visual_description: Pattern Interrupt visual: But here's the twist... over time, those isolated groups adapt to their unique environments.
ai_image_prompt: Pattern Interrupt visual: But here's the twist... over time, those isolated groups adapt to their unique environments.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Pattern Interrupt visual: But here's the twist... over time, those isolated groups adapt to their unique environments.

narration: These adaptations can lead to genetic changes, and eventually, they become distinct species!
visual_description: Escalation visual: These adaptations can lead to genetic changes, and eventually, they become distinct species!
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: These adaptations can lead to genetic changes, and eventually, they become distinct species!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: These adaptations can lead to genetic changes, and eventually, they become distinct species!

narration: So, speciation is nature’s incredible way of creating diversity, but it’s not always clear-cut.
visual_description: Payoff visual: So, speciation is nature’s incredible way of creating diversity, but it’s not always clear-cut.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: So, speciation is nature’s incredible way of creating diversity, but it’s not always clear-cut.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: So, speciation is nature’s incredible way of creating diversity, but it’s not always clear-cut.
